privileged_info_summary: Verified that patient James Chen's records are synthetically generated and dynamically injected into CouchDB via setup scripts with patient ID 'patient_p1_000002', friendly ID 'P00002', DOB '1978-11-22T00:00:00.000Z', sex 'Male', and blood type 'A+'. The expected outcome state exactly matches the task instructions to update the address to '1200 Harbor Boulevard', phone to '555-0199', and email to 'j.chen.new@email.com'.
